title: claytonia viridis
intro: Claytonia viridis, also known as spring purslane or miner's lettuce, is a type of edible, annual herb native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Claytonia viridis include its ability to support healthy digestion, boost energy levels, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used in salads, as a cooked green, or as a tea to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
